reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Muy poco personal. Tardan bastante algo que tendría que ser fluido. Pero eso no tienen culp los empleados si hay 20 autos y solo atienden 2

(Translated by Google)
Very few staff. Things that should be quick and easy take a long time. But that's not the employees' fault if there are 20 cars and they're only serving 2.

reviews.comment:
Los martes siempre sin sistema y no podes pagar con la AP para que te hagan el descuento

(Translated by Google)
The system is always down on Tuesdays, and you can't pay with your AP card to get the discount.
